channel.title: Accept json at populate function
channel.description:
## Description Right now populate function just accepts a Response as an argument and it'd be great to accept a json too. ## User Stories > As a **Frontity developer** > I want to **pass a json to [populate](https://docs.frontity.org/api-reference-1/wordpress-source#populate-response-state-subdirectory) function** > so that **I can populate the state the same way as Frontity does for my custom needs**
## Possible solution We could add a parameter to populate function named `json` and if it is passed, ignored the Response.json().

item.title: Accept json at populate function
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Yes, I think it makes sense to close this.

Btw, sorry for the late reply but I didn’t get notified properly of this one. Not sure why but maybe as it was an old topic, and I suscribed to the category later, I wasn’t tracking this one, I don’t know.

Read full topic

item.title: Accept json at populate function
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
We’re going to get rid of populate in the v2 of source. Should we close this?

Read full topic

item.title: Accept json at populate function
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Description

Right now populate function just accepts a Response as an argument and it’d be great to accept a json too.

User Stories

As a Frontity developer
I want to pass a json to populate function
so that I can populate the state the same way as Frontity does for my custom needs

Possible solution

We could add a parameter to populate function named json and if it is passed, ignored the Response.json().

Read full topic
